overall.description: A cinematic sequence from a AAA cyberpunk video game depicting a heavy rainstorm in a dystopian industrial district. The player character, equipped with cybernetic enhancements, interacts with NPCs on a construction platform before exploring the rain-soaked environment with towering scaffolding, digital billboards, and distant city structures.

camera begins circling around the NPCs during their conversation

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rain-soaked construction platform where three characters stand conversing near orange safety barriers. The camera circles the group, revealing a tall industrial tower with green lights in the background and various construction debris scattered around the wet concrete surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated construction walkway with industrial scaffolding

events.description: character turns and walks away from the NPC group along the platform
moving past the initial group into the open platform area with view of distant structures

agents.ego_description: walking away from the NPC group along the rain-soaked construction platform, heading toward the edge of the structure

large geometric glass and metal dome structure visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the conversation along the elevated platform, passing the orange barriers. A large digital billboard reading 'PURE OVERKILL' becomes visible on the left, while a distinctive geodesic glass dome appears in the distant background through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: overlook point with view of lower city streets and burning vehicle

view opens up to reveal the lower dystopian street with burning vehicle and scattered pedestrians

metal walkway connecting two buildings across the street below
tall palm trees visible in the lower city area, swaying in the rain

segments.scene_description: Approaching the edge of the platform, the character descends stairs toward the lower city level. The view opens to reveal a dystopian street scene with a burning car, an elevated pedestrian bridge, and palm trees swaying in the heavy rain. Distant figures move through the haze below.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground level construction zone with guard post and debris

events.description: reaching the bottom of the stairs and entering the street level construction area
camera looks up at the massive scaffolded building, revealing its scale and industrial details

agents.ego_description: navigating through debris and construction barriers at street level, examining the surrounding industrial structures and guard post

enormous industrial building covered in extensive scaffolding and construction equipment with glowing orange lights
grey concrete blocks with red and white caution tape strung between them

segments.scene_description: At street level, the character moves through a debris-filled construction zone with concrete barriers and a small guard tower. A massive building covered in scaffolding dominates the view, while a barrier tagged with 'ZORRA' graffiti appears on the right. The rain continues to pour over the dystopian industrial landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a high-altitude construction platform into the gritty, rain-drenched depths of a dystopian industrial street. It begins by circling a group of characters conversing near orange safety barriers on a wet concrete platform, with a tall industrial tower glowing with green lights in the background. As the character walks away from the group, the perspective shifts to reveal a large digital billboard reading PURE OVERKILL and a distant geodesic glass dome shimmering through the heavy rain. The scene then opens up as the camera descends a set of stairs, transitioning from the elevated platform to a lower city level featuring a burning car, swaying palm trees, and an elevated pedestrian bridge. Finally, the movement leads through a debris-filled construction zone at street level, passing a guard tower and a barrier tagged with ZORRA graffiti before coming to a halt beneath a massive building shrouded in scaffolding.
